hero.sub: WarrantyVault scans your receipts with AI, tracks every expiry date, and guides you through claims — so you never waste another rupee.

features.heading: Everything you need to
features.sub: From scanning receipts to filing claims, WarrantyVault handles the entire warranty lifecycle.
features.ocrDesc: Drop any invoice — printed or handwritten. Our vision AI extracts every detail in seconds.
features.reminderDesc: Get alerts 30 and 7 days before warranties expire. Never miss a claim window again.
features.claimDesc: Step-by-step claim guidance powered by AI. Maximizes your success rate with intelligent recommendations.
features.mapDesc: Locate authorized service centers nearby. Filtered by brand, area, with warranty links and directions.
features.lockerDesc: Receipts, invoices, and warranty cards — encrypted and accessible from anywhere, anytime.
features.analyticsDesc: Visual dashboard with status breakdown, expiry timeline, and portfolio health at a glance.

howItWorks.heading: How it
howItWorks.sub: Three simple steps to warranty peace of mind.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Snap a photo or upload a PDF of any invoice. Our OCR AI extracts all warranty details instantly.
howItWorks.step2Desc: WarrantyVault organizes your warranties by category, status, and expiry — with smart reminders.
howItWorks.step3Desc: When something breaks, our AI claim wizard guides you through the entire claim process step-by-step.

pricing.heading: Choose your
pricing.sub: Start free, upgrade when you need more power.
pricing.proDesc: For individuals who want full control

cta.heading: Your warranties deserve
cta.sub: Join thousands who never miss a warranty claim. Set up your vault in under a minute.
